# PRD

## Why this file exists

`PRD.md` records the product boundary: who this project serves,
what use cases are in scope, and what use cases are deliberately
out of scope. SPEC describes *how*; PRD describes *for whom and
why*. Decisions in `DECISION_LOG.md` cite PRD when scope is the
load-bearing rationale.
